hindi: जय महालक्ष्मी माता रानी। क्षीर सागर से उत्पन्न भवानी॥
english: Victory to Mahalakshmi Mata the queen; born from the milk ocean, Bhavani
roman: Jai Mahalakshmi Mata Rani, Kshir Sagar Se Utpann Bhavani

hindi: अष्ट लक्ष्मी के रूप अनेक। धन धान्य पुत्र विजय विवेक॥
english: The eight forms of Lakshmi are many; wealth, grain, children, victory and wisdom
roman: Asht Lakshmi Ke Roop Anek, Dhan Dhanya Putra Vijay Vivek

hindi: विष्णु की प्रिया लक्ष्मी रानी। वैकुंठ में विराजत दानी॥
english: Lakshmi the queen, beloved of Vishnu; the generous one dwelling in Vaikuntha
roman: Vishnu Ki Priya Lakshmi Rani, Vaikunth Mein Virajat Dani

hindi: कमल पर बैठी दो हाथ वर में। गज से स्नान कराती सुंदर में॥
english: Seated on a lotus, two hands in blessing; elephants bathe her beautifully
roman: Kamal Par Baithi Do Haath Var Mein, Gaj Se Snaan Karati Sundar Mein

hindi: शुक्रवार को महालक्ष्मी पूजन। धन प्राप्ति का है यह सूत्र मूजन॥
english: Friday is for Mahalakshmi worship; this is the formula for attaining wealth
roman: Shukravar Ko Mahalakshmi Poojan, Dhan Prapti Ka Hai Yeh Sutra Moojan

hindi: महालक्ष्मी चालीसा जो पढ़े। धन और वैभव सदा बढ़े॥
english: Whoever reads the Mahalakshmi Chalisa; wealth and prosperity always grow
roman: Mahalakshmi Chalisa Jo Padhe, Dhan Aur Vaibhav Sada Badhe

hindi: जय जय महालक्ष्मी भवानी। धन समृद्धि की तुम हो रानी॥
english: Victory to Mahalakshmi Bhavani; you are the queen of wealth and prosperity
roman: Jai Jai Mahalakshmi Bhavani, Dhan Samridhi Ki Tum Ho Rani
